title: angelonia biflora
intro: Angelonia biflora, also known as the angel flower, is a flowering plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, with its leaves and flowers being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Angelonia biflora include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Angelonia biflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
